description_long: This is a bulbous, anthropomorphic ceramic vase with a rounded lower body and a tall, narrow neck. The upper portion of the vase features a stylized human face with pronounced eyes, a nose, and a mouth, as well as two small, protruding arms on either side. The surface is covered with a dense pattern of small, evenly spaced indentations, giving it a textured appearance. The coloration is primarily earthy brown with lighter, weathered patches, suggesting age and exposure. The neck is slightly flared and appears to have a rough, unfinished rim. The overall form and decorative elements suggest it may be inspired by traditional or ancient pottery styles.
description: A textured, anthropomorphic ceramic vase with a rounded body, tall neck, and stylized human face and arms. The surface is covered in small indentations and earthy brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the human face, both arms, and the full textured pattern on the upper body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one arm in profile and the side of the face, with the neck's curvature visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vase, with the textured pattern and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other arm and side of the face, with the neck and shoulder details.
